prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
tab_title_observed: 千问-阿里 AI 助手
summary: v2.2.3-REBUILT canary for qwen3. Active Chrome tab '千问-阿里 AI 助手' hosted at qianwen.com/chat (NOT chat.qwen.ai as the request URL specified — qianwen.com is the Chinese-domain Qwen front-end the user is signed-out of, '登录' button visible bottom-left). Created new conversation via 新建对话 button, typed full PII prompt into 向千问提问 composer (id=5), pressed Enter. User bubble rendered correctly with the prompt verbatim (S2 attached / submit_succeeded). After ~15s the assistant area rendered the Chinese fallback string '抱歉，系统超时，请稍后重试。' (Sorry, system timeout, please try again later) instead of the expected Korean '차단' warning bubble. No Korean text anywhere in the response, no APF warning toast, no full-page intercept. Tab title remained '千问-阿里 AI 助手' (no '보안 정책 - 접근 차단' transition). Behavior matches REGRESSION_text_no_render signature: prompt reaches the service, service returns a generic timeout/error envelope, APF chat-bubble warning never rendered. Total mission under 3 minutes per spec.
response_text_observed: 抱歉，系统超时，请稍后重试。
console_errors: DevTools not opened in this canary run — fast-path used windows-mcp Snapshot + Screenshot only; backend timeout-string suggests upstream block/intercept that fell through to generic Chinese fallback rather than rendering Korean warning

comparison.vs_v2.2.3_baseline_expectation: REGRESSED — expected Korean '차단' chat-bubble warning at qwen3; observed only Chinese system-timeout string. Block-path likely fired upstream but warning-text injection failed to render Korean output.
comparison.url_note: Request specified https://chat.qwen.ai/ but the live tab is qianwen.com/chat (Chinese front-end). Both domains belong to Alibaba Qwen but use different APF service-detection signatures. If APF regex/service-name registration targets only chat.qwen.ai, qianwen.com traffic would bypass intercept entirely — alternative explanation for the missing '차단' text.

notes: Snapshot evidence — user-side bubble: '내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?' (rendered cleanly). Assistant-side: '抱歉，系统超时，请稍后重试。' (rendered ~15s later). No '차단' substring anywhere on the rendered page. The active tab is the Chinese qianwen.com domain — recommend dev-side verify whether APF service registration for qwen3 covers both chat.qwen.ai AND qianwen.com (or whether test PC should navigate to chat.qwen.ai explicitly before submitting). If service registration only covers chat.qwen.ai, this run is technically out-of-scope; if it should also cover qianwen.com, this is a genuine REGRESSION_text_no_render.
